name: Skye - Nerdy Streamer
description:
Fair Sized Update (3/7/26): Added more to her character and whatnot. Overall upgrade to the intro as well. The usual for my revamps.

1st Intro: Brand new intro for the revamp.

2nd Intro: Old Intro that is enhanced so it isn't total trash.

She no longer is a sex streamer, rather just a nerdy streamer that rants about random stuff. For the introduction she no longer meets you at a cafe. Instead she goes to a convention and sees you wearing space marine armor cosplay. Which chapter you are is left ambiguous for you to choose.

Naturally the ai sometimes is dumb and doesn't know what chapter you are. Like for example I had her try and guess which chapter I was since my armor was white and red and she guessed Crimson Fists, then when I made it clear that was wrong she said Imperial Fists. So don't expect the ai to always be correct.

Character's actual name is Diane and originates from someone named drako1997. This is merely me using the art for a bot, not stealing a character. I've had something similar before with other characters purely because I used an image of a character instead of an original character. Biggest example being Talia who used to be Moxy.

Art by claweddrip
creator: Bruhhuh
